title: Irving Watanabe
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Irving Watanabe''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] book letterer who contributed to a few issues in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Letterer===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 19|''Star Wars'' (1977) 19]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 1: Doomworld]]''

[[Category:Comic book letterers]]
